member.name: M:MyUnoApp.App.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the singleton application object. This is the first line of authored code executed, and as such is the logical equivalent of main() or WinMain().

member.name: M:MyUnoApp.App.OnNavigationFailed(System.Object,Microsoft.UI.Xaml.Navigation.NavigationFailedEventArgs)
member.summary: Invoked when Navigation to a certain page fails

member.name: T:MyUnoApp.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.

member.name: M:MyUnoApp.WindowExtensions.SetWindowIcon(Microsoft.UI.Xaml.Window)
member.summary: This will set the Window Icon for the given using the provided UnoIcon.

member.name: T:MyUnoApp.DrawableResourcesIdResolver
member.summary: Resolves the Id of a bundled image.

member.name: T:MyUnoApp.__Sources__.EmbeddedXamlSourcesProvider
member.summary: Provides access to the embedded XAML sources
member.remarks: This class is used to provide the embedded XAML sources to the Hot Reload engine. This is not intended to be used directly by application code. WON'T BE GENERATED ON RELEASE BUILDS

member.name: P:MyUnoApp.__Sources__.EmbeddedXamlSourcesProvider.UpdateCounter
member.summary: Gets the current update counter, used to detect changes in the sources.
member.remarks: This counter is incremented each time a Hot Reload sources update is detected.

member.name: T:MyUnoApp.GlobalStaticResources
member.summary: Contains all the static resources defined for the application

member.name: T:__Uno.HotReload.HotReloadInfo
member.summary: Helper class to provide info regarding hot reload functionality in Uno Platform applications.

member.name: P:__Uno.HotReload.HotReloadInfo.VersionId
member.summary: Gets the incremental current version ID of the application.
member.remarks: When not 0, this matches the "UpdateFileResponse.HotReloadCorrelationId" which is also the "HotReloadServerOperation.Id".

member.name: P:__Uno.HotReload.HotReloadInfo.LastUpdateFileRequestId
member.summary: Gets the Id of the last Uno.UI.RemoteControl.HotReload.Messages.UpdateFile request processed by the Dev Server, if any.

member.name: T:Uno.Resizetizer.__LegacyResizetizerSupport__
member.summary: This is added to ensure the Uno.Resizetizer namespace is present to avoid breaking any applications.
